use_cases: Hero section background animation with animated sparkles
Interactive sparkle overlay for buttons and CTAs
Ambient visual effect for loading states
Enhancement for marketing and promotional sections
ai_summary: SparklesCore is a customizable particle animation component built on tsparticles and framer-motion. It renders animated sparkle effects with configurable particle density, size, color, and speed, making it ideal for adding visual flair to hero sections, landing pages, or decorative backgrounds in SaaS, e-commerce, and media applications.
